messages.content: You have been given an increment of 17% (12% for 3 rating & 5% for promotion). The AD entry level salary is 33 lacs for Mum, Delhi has loc factor of 92.5% thus AD salary in Delhi is 30.52 lacs. The net impact of promotion is only 1% on increment if compared to a 4 rating with no promotion, if bonus is taken into account, 4 rating with no promotion wud have been financially better for you.
